homepage.heroSubline: Transforming outdoor spaces with durable, beautiful hardscapes. Serving Cleveland and surrounding communities with expert craftsmanship.
aboutText: CleveLandScaping LLC started with a simple goal: to bring exceptional hardscaping services to our neighbors in Cleveland. We’re a local team, born and raised right here, and we understand the unique challenges our climate poses to outdoor construction.

We believe in doing things right the first time. That means using quality materials, employing skilled tradespeople, and paying attention to every detail. We treat every project, big or small, as if it were for our own home.

We're committed to our community. We source materials locally whenever possible, supporting other Cleveland businesses. We also volunteer our time and resources to local parks and community gardens, helping to keep our city beautiful.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We know Cleveland's climate and soil conditions, ensuring long-lasting results.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We use only the best materials, built to withstand Cleveland winters and humid summers.

valueProps.title: Skilled Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Our team of experienced professionals delivers exceptional workmanship on every project.

valueProps.title: Customer Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We're committed to exceeding your expectations and ensuring your complete satisfaction.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote for your hardscaping project today!

services.name: Patio Installation
services.shortDescription: Create a stunning outdoor living space with a custom-designed patio.
services.description:
A well-designed patio is the cornerstone of any great outdoor living space. At CleveLandScaping LLC, we specialize in creating beautiful and durable patios that will stand the test of time. We work with a variety of materials, including pavers, natural stone, and concrete, to create a patio that perfectly complements your home and lifestyle. 

Our patio installation process begins with a thorough consultation to understand your needs and vision. We'll then develop a custom design that takes into account your budget, style preferences, and the specific characteristics of your property. Our experienced team will handle every aspect of the installation, from site preparation to final finishing touches. We pay close attention to drainage and proper installation techniques to ensure your patio remains level and stable for years to come. 

Whether you're looking for a small, intimate patio for quiet relaxation or a large, expansive patio for entertaining, CleveLandScaping LLC can bring your vision to life. We're committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship, using quality materials, and delivering outstanding customer service.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your needs and create a custom patio design.
Step 2: Site Preparation – We prepare the site by excavating and leveling the ground.
Step 3: Base Installation – We install a solid base of gravel and compacted aggregate.
Step 4: Paver Installation – We carefully lay pavers in your chosen pattern, ensuring proper spacing and alignment.
benefits: Creates a beautiful outdoor living space
Provides a durable and low-maintenance surface

faq.question: What materials are best for patios in Cleveland?
faq.answer: Pavers and natural stone are excellent choices, as they can withstand Cleveland's freeze-thaw cycles. Concrete is another option, but it may require sealing to prevent cracking.

faq.question: How long does patio installation take?
faq.answer: The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most patios can be installed in 1-3 days.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for patio installation?
faq.answer: In some cases, a permit may be required. We can help you determine if a permit is needed and assist with the application process.

services.name: Retaining Walls
services.shortDescription: Build strong and attractive retaining walls to enhance your landscape.
services.description:
Retaining walls are essential for managing slopes, preventing erosion, and creating usable outdoor spaces. CleveLandScaping LLC specializes in designing and installing durable and aesthetically pleasing retaining walls that will enhance your property for years to come. We understand the importance of proper construction techniques to ensure your retaining wall can withstand the pressure of the soil and the elements. 

We offer a variety of retaining wall materials, including concrete blocks, natural stone, and timber. Our experienced team will help you choose the best material for your specific needs and budget. We'll also take into account the aesthetic of your home and landscape to create a retaining wall that complements your property. 

From small garden walls to large structural walls, CleveLandScaping LLC has the expertise to handle any retaining wall project. We prioritize proper drainage and soil compaction to ensure the longevity and stability of your wall. Trust us to build a retaining wall that is both functional and beautiful, adding value and curb appeal to your Cleveland home.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment – We evaluate the site to determine the wall's height, length, and soil conditions.
Step 2: Design and Planning – We develop a custom retaining wall design that meets your needs and budget.
Step 3: Excavation and Base Preparation – We excavate the site and prepare a solid base for the wall.
Step 4: Wall Construction – We carefully construct the wall using your chosen materials, ensuring proper drainage and stability.

faq.question: What type of retaining wall is best for my property?
faq.answer: The best type of retaining wall depends on several factors, including the height of the wall, soil conditions, and your budget. We can help you determine the best option for your specific needs.

faq.question: How long will a retaining wall last?
faq.answer: With proper construction and maintenance, a retaining wall can last for many years. The lifespan of a retaining wall depends on the materials used and the severity of the weather conditions.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a retaining wall?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, a permit is required for retaining wall construction. We can help you navigate the permitting process.

services.name: Walkways & Pathways
services.shortDescription: Design and install beautiful and functional walkways and pathways.
services.description:
Enhance the accessibility and beauty of your property with custom-designed walkways and pathways from CleveLandScaping LLC. We specialize in creating safe, durable, and aesthetically pleasing walkways that complement your home and landscape. A well-designed walkway can improve curb appeal, create inviting outdoor spaces, and provide easy access to different areas of your property.

We offer a wide range of materials for walkways and pathways, including pavers, natural stone, gravel, and concrete. Our team will work with you to choose the best material for your specific needs, budget, and style preferences. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper drainage, leveling, and installation techniques. 

Whether you're looking for a simple garden path or an elaborate walkway leading to your front door, CleveLandScaping LLC can bring your vision to life. We're committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship, using quality materials, and delivering outstanding customer service. Let us help you create walkways and pathways that enhance the beauty and functionality of your Cleveland home.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your needs and create a custom walkway or pathway design.
Step 2: Site Preparation – We prepare the site by excavating and leveling the ground.
Step 3: Base Installation – We install a solid base of gravel and compacted aggregate.
Step 4: Material Installation – We carefully install your chosen materials, ensuring proper spacing and alignment.
benefits: Improves accessibility to different areas of your property

faq.question: What is the best material for walkways in Cleveland?
faq.answer: Pavers and natural stone are popular choices for walkways, as they are durable and can withstand Cleveland's weather conditions. Gravel is a more affordable option, but it may require more maintenance.

faq.question: How wide should a walkway be?
faq.answer: A walkway should be at least 3 feet wide to allow two people to walk comfortably side-by-side.

faq.question: Do I need to seal my walkway?
faq.answer: Sealing your walkway can help protect it from stains and weather damage. We recommend sealing walkways every 1-2 years.

services.name: Driveway Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Install or repair your driveway with durable materials and expert craftsmanship.
services.description:
A well-maintained driveway is essential for the safety, functionality, and curb appeal of your home. CleveLandScaping LLC offers comprehensive driveway installation and repair services to homeowners in Cleveland and surrounding areas. We understand the importance of a durable and properly installed driveway that can withstand the harsh Cleveland winters and heavy traffic.

We offer a variety of driveway materials, including concrete, asphalt, and pavers. Our experienced team will help you choose the best material for your specific needs, budget, and aesthetic preferences. We pay close attention to proper grading, drainage, and compaction to ensure your driveway remains level and stable for years to come. 

Whether you need a new driveway installed, an existing driveway repaired, or a driveway resurfaced, CleveLandScaping LLC has the expertise to handle any project. We're committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship, using quality materials, and delivering outstanding customer service.
process: Step 1: Site Evaluation – We assess the existing driveway and determine the best course of action.
Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the right materials for your driveway based on your needs and budget.
Step 3: Excavation and Grading – We excavate the site and ensure proper grading for drainage.
Step 4: Installation or Repair – We install new driveway materials or repair existing damage.
benefits: Provides a safe and durable surface for vehicles
Prevents water damage to your home's foundation

faq.question: What is the best material for driveways in Cleveland?
faq.answer: Concrete and asphalt are both popular choices for driveways in Cleveland. Concrete is more durable and longer-lasting, while asphalt is more affordable.

faq.question: How often should I seal my driveway?
faq.answer: We recommend sealing your driveway every 2-3 years to protect it from water damage and stains.

faq.question: How can I prevent cracks in my driveway?
faq.answer: Proper installation and maintenance are key to preventing cracks in your driveway. Make sure your driveway is properly graded for drainage and avoid parking heavy vehicles on it.

services.name: Outdoor Kitchens
services.shortDescription: Design and build custom outdoor kitchens for ultimate entertaining.
services.description:
Transform your backyard into an outdoor oasis with a custom-designed outdoor kitchen from CleveLandScaping LLC. We specialize in creating functional and beautiful outdoor kitchens that are perfect for entertaining, cooking, and enjoying the outdoors. An outdoor kitchen can add value to your home and provide a unique space for family and friends to gather.

We offer a wide range of outdoor kitchen features, including grills, smokers, refrigerators, sinks, countertops, and storage. Our team will work with you to design an outdoor kitchen that meets your specific needs, budget, and style preferences. We use durable and weather-resistant materials to ensure your outdoor kitchen can withstand the elements.

From simple grill islands to elaborate outdoor kitchens with all the amenities, CleveLandScaping LLC can bring your vision to life. We're committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship, using quality materials, and delivering outstanding customer service.
process: Step 1: Design and Planning – We discuss your needs and create a custom outdoor kitchen design.
Step 2: Site Preparation – We prepare the site by running utilities and building a foundation.
Step 3: Appliance Installation – We install your chosen appliances, ensuring proper connections.
Step 4: Finishing Touches – We add countertops, storage, and other finishing touches.
benefits: Creates a unique outdoor entertaining space
Allows you to cook and dine outdoors
Enhances your backyard's beauty and functionality

faq.question: What materials are best for outdoor kitchens in Cleveland?
faq.answer: Durable and weather-resistant materials like stainless steel, concrete, and natural stone are ideal for outdoor kitchens in Cleveland.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for an outdoor kitchen?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, a permit is required for outdoor kitchen construction. We can help you navigate the permitting process.

faq.question: How can I protect my outdoor kitchen from the weather?
faq.answer: We recommend using covers for your appliances and furniture during the off-season. You can also build a pergola or roof over your outdoor kitchen to provide additional protection.

services.name: Fire Pits & Fireplaces
services.shortDescription: Install custom fire pits and outdoor fireplaces for warmth and ambiance.
services.description:
Extend your outdoor season and create a cozy gathering space with a custom-designed fire pit or outdoor fireplace from CleveLandScaping LLC. We specialize in building beautiful and functional fire features that add warmth, ambiance, and value to your property. A fire pit or fireplace can transform your backyard into a relaxing retreat for family and friends.

We offer a variety of fire pit and fireplace options, including wood-burning, gas-burning, and propane-burning models. Our team will work with you to choose the best option for your specific needs, budget, and style preferences. We use durable and fire-resistant materials to ensure your fire feature is safe and long-lasting.

From simple fire pits to elaborate outdoor fireplaces with custom stonework, CleveLandScaping LLC can bring your vision to life. We're committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship, using quality materials, and delivering outstanding customer service.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We discuss your needs and create a custom fire pit or fireplace design.
Step 2: Site Preparation – We prepare the site by excavating and leveling the ground.
Step 3: Fire Feature Construction – We build the fire pit or fireplace using your chosen materials.
Step 4: Finishing Touches – We add seating, landscaping, and other finishing touches.

faq.question: What type of fire pit is best for my property?
faq.answer: The best type of fire pit depends on your preferences and budget. Wood-burning fire pits are more traditional, while gas-burning fire pits are more convenient.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a fire pit?
faq.answer: In some cases, a permit may be required for fire pit construction. We can help you determine if a permit is needed and assist with the application process.

faq.question: What safety precautions should I take with a fire pit?
faq.answer: Always supervise children and pets around a fire pit. Keep flammable materials away from the fire and never leave a fire unattended.

serviceAreas.content:
CleveLandScaping LLC is proud to offer our expert hardscaping services to the residents and businesses of Cleveland, Ohio. We understand the unique challenges and opportunities that Cleveland's diverse neighborhoods present, from the historic architecture of Ohio City to the modern developments in University Circle. Our team is committed to providing high-quality hardscaping solutions that enhance the beauty and functionality of your outdoor spaces.

Whether you're looking to create a stunning patio for entertaining, a durable driveway that can withstand Cleveland's winters, or a custom retaining wall to improve your property's drainage, CleveLandScaping LLC has the experience and expertise to deliver exceptional results. We use only the finest materials and employ proven techniques to ensure that your hardscaping project is built to last. We are dedicated to serving our neighbors and contributing to the beauty of Cleveland, one project at a time.
serviceAreas.localContext: Cleveland is a major city on the shores of Lake Erie, known for its vibrant arts and culture scene, diverse neighborhoods, and strong industrial heritage.

serviceAreas.content:
CleveLandScaping LLC is delighted to provide top-notch hardscaping services to the residents of Lakewood, Ohio. We appreciate the unique charm and character of Lakewood, with its beautiful parks, historic homes, and thriving local businesses. Our team is dedicated to enhancing the outdoor spaces of Lakewood homes and businesses with our expertise and commitment to quality.

From designing and installing custom patios and walkways to building durable retaining walls and outdoor kitchens, CleveLandScaping LLC offers a comprehensive range of hardscaping solutions to meet your needs. We understand Lakewood's aesthetic preferences and strive to create outdoor spaces that complement the city's unique architectural styles and community spirit. We're proud to serve Lakewood and contribute to its continued vibrancy.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: CleveLandScaping LLC did an amazing job installing our new patio! They were professional, efficient, and the finished product is beautiful. We can't wait to spend more time outdoors this summer thanks to their hard work.

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We hired CleveLandScaping LLC to build a retaining wall in our backyard, and they did a fantastic job. The wall is sturdy, looks great, and is exactly what we needed to prevent erosion. There were a few minor delays due to weather, but they communicated clearly throughout the process.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: The team at CleveLandScaping LLC transformed our front yard with a beautiful new walkway. They helped us choose the perfect pavers to match our home's style, and the installation was quick and efficient. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Our driveway was in terrible shape after years of Cleveland winters. CleveLandScaping LLC came out and repaired the cracks and resurfaced the entire driveway. It looks brand new! We were very impressed with their professionalism and attention to detail.

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: We recently had an outdoor kitchen installed by CleveLandScaping LLC, and we love it! It's the perfect space for entertaining and cooking outdoors. The only reason I'm not giving 5 stars is because there were a couple of minor issues with the plumbing, but they were quickly resolved.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: CleveLandScaping LLC built us a custom fire pit in our backyard, and it's the perfect spot for relaxing and entertaining. The team was professional, knowledgeable, and the finished product is exactly what we wanted. We highly recommend them!
